payload.answer: Replace the existing preference memory with the corrected one: Sam from Goldman likes early Coltrane. Mark the Bill Evans memory as superseded, not current.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Detected an explicit correction to an existing preference fact.

repair_options: Replace the current preference fact 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans' with 'Sam from Goldman likes early Coltrane.'
Mark the Bill Evans preference memory as superseded/corrected rather than active.
